subject: Your getmentor.dev profile has moved to OpenMentor
html:
Translated, converted to USD, and hidden until you switch it on
Your profile has moved
Hi {{first_name}} — good news: your getmentor.dev mentor profile has been migrated to OpenMentor, the international mentoring platform for the global market.
What happened during the move
• Your profile text was translated to English.
• Your price was converted to US dollars.
• Your profile is already approved — but it's hidden from the catalog until you switch it on.
To go live, sign in with a magic link (use this email address — no password needed), review the translated profile, adjust anything you like, and flip the visibility toggle. Your future public profile will live at {{mentor_profile_url}}.
Review my profile
Your getmentor.dev profile is not affected — it keeps working as before.
If anything looks off in the translation, or you'd rather not be on OpenMentor at all, just reply to this email and we'll sort it out (including deleting the migrated profile).
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
text:
Hi {{first_name}},

Good news — your getmentor.dev mentor profile has been migrated to OpenMentor (https://openmentor.io), the international mentoring platform for the global market.

What happened during the move:
- Your profile text was translated to English.
- Your price was converted to US dollars.
- Your profile is already approved — but it's HIDDEN from the catalog until you switch it on.

To go live, sign in to your mentor dashboard with a magic link (use this email address — no password needed), review the translated profile, adjust anything you like, and flip the visibility toggle:
https://openmentor.io/mentor/login

Your future public profile will live at:
{{mentor_profile_url}}

Your getmentor.dev profile is not affected — it keeps working as before.

If anything looks off in the translation, or you'd rather not be on OpenMentor at all, just reply to this email and we'll sort it out (including deleting the migrated profile).

---
openmentor.io · free mentorship for the tech community
https://openmentor.io
